evaluators.name: Earliest 4th Grade Math/Science Program Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a 4th-grade math/science after-school program costing ≤ $40/month, ending by 4:30 PM, and whether the earliest-start qualifying program was saved.

evaluators.name: Three Vegetarian Nut-Free Lunches Planned Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added vegetarian, nut-free primary lunch entrées for three different days in the 'Week of March 9' menu, starting from the earliest qualifying days.

evaluators.name: Earliest Oak Street Elementary Route Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved an active K-5 Oak Street route arriving before 7:45 AM and whether the earliest-arriving qualifying route was saved.

evaluators.name: First Two April Evening 1st-Grade Events Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the first two April events for 1st-grade families that start between 5:00 PM and 8:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Most Experienced 3rd-Grade Math Teacher Contacted Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user sent a message via the on-site form to the most experienced 3rd-grade math teacher, and whether the message body mentions 'math homework expectations'.

evaluators.name: 2nd Grade 30-Minute Homework Policy Bookmarked Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bookmarked the 2nd-grade homework time guidelines section that limits nightly homework to 30 minutes.

evaluators.name: Four Cheapest Optional 2nd Grade Supply Items Added Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the four lowest-cost optional 2nd-grade supply items (each costing $5.00 or less) to their supply checklist.

evaluators.name: First July 9–3 Camp Interest Submitted Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted an interest form for the earliest July summer camp session that runs 9:00 AM–3:00 PM and costs no more than $150 per week.
